message:
perf: wrap hot-path components in React.memo and memoize inline styles (#3703)

Wrap TreeNodeItem (recursive, rendered per tree node) and StatBlock /
HorseshoeGauge (rendered per stat block) in React.memo to skip
unnecessary re-renders when props are unchanged. Memoize depth-based
padding style objects in TreeNodeItem with useMemo so the same object
reference is reused across renders.

The test-file `import * as Module` patterns flagged in #3694 are
intentional — they enable jest.spyOn mocking and do not affect
production bundle tree-shaking. The remaining 1200+ inline arrow
functions are mostly event handlers in leaf components where
useCallback would add complexity without measurable benefit.

Closes #3694

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
